description: Style Note adidas perfumes come with the promise of long lasting fragrance and patented Fragrance Booster Technology to take you through the day and way into the night. Product Details adidas's Victory League comes in an aerosol spray canister and has an oriental fragrance The fragrance has traces of cinnamon, lavender, musk, vanilla, basil, pear, cedar and bergamot Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 100 ml
